products.name: Peak Design is taking up to 50 percent off some of our favorite bags right now

products.name: Valve is fighting Steam Controller scalpers with a new reservations system

products.name: ChatGPT’s ‘Trusted Contact’ will alert loved ones of safety concerns

products.name: Live updates from Elon Musk and Sam Altman’s court battle over the future of OpenAI

products.name: OpenAI launches new voice intelligence features in its API
products.summary: The new features could be handy for customer service systems, but OpenAI says they have applications that work across a variety of other fields, including education and creator platforms.
